title: Bare Bones x Horseman
description: Copper horn texture and lead slot
body:
This pack adds a Bare Bones texture for the copper horn, as well as the mount lead slot that matches the Bare Bones lead.

Subtle, but ensures Horseman doesn't stand out in a Bare Bones pack.

---
## Before:
![Donkey inventory menu, showing default lead and copper horn texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f91fee57d7d87430bee31926ac9d88dc1e96da4.png)

## After:
